PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Nov-02-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jennifer Field, via Zoom, for Beatrice Saviola, Administrator.

Counsel confirms that Doctors Without Borders has not been notified regarding this matter. Counsel advises that her client is in the process of marshaling previously unknown assets and that an accounting petition is being prepared and intends to file it as soon as possible.

After additional discussion, the Status Petition is taken under submission. A Status Hearing on the Filing of First Accounting is set for Dec-13-2022 at 9:00 am.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Aug-09-2022 Continued To Oct-18-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jul-27-2022 Continued To Aug-09-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-26-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-12-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. The Court finds that notice is appropriate. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters of Administration With Will Annexed. The holographic will dated August 23, 2017 is admitted to probate. Beatrice Saviola is appointed as the Administrator with Will Annexed with full authority. Bond is set at $700,000.00. Order for the same signed. Status on close of estate is set for April 26, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
